scdown 0.1.0
  • Get Started
  • Reference
    • Getting Started

Getting Started

Source: vignettes/getting-started.Rmd
getting-started.Rmd

scdown is designed to stay short after annotation.

  1. build one scdown object
  2. inspect maps and markers
  3. inspect genes of interest
  4. summarize composition and signatures
  5. export a compact report

Build an object 

obj <- scdown(scdown_example())
obj
#> <scdown_obj>
#>   cells: 24 
#>   samples: 3 
#>   annotations: 6

Map 

map_res <- plot_map(obj)
kable(head(map_res$tables$embedding_cells, 10))
cell UMAP1 UMAP2 sample group cell_type lineage
cell_1 -2.2 2.2 S1 control CD4_T T/NK
cell_2 -2.2 1.8 S1 control CD4_T T/NK
cell_3 -2.2 2.4 S1 control CD4_T T/NK
cell_4 -2.2 1.6 S1 control CD4_T T/NK
cell_5 -1.8 1.9 S1 control CD8_T T/NK
cell_6 -1.8 1.5 S1 control CD8_T T/NK
cell_7 -1.8 2.3 S1 control CD8_T T/NK
cell_8 -1.8 1.7 S1 control CD8_T T/NK
cell_9 -0.1 -1.1 S2 control NK T/NK
cell_10 -0.1 -0.8 S2 control NK T/NK

Markers 

marker_res <- find_markers(obj, top_n = 3)
kable(marker_res$tables$top_marker_per_celltype)
cell_type gene mean_in_type mean_rest pct_in_type pct_rest marker_score marker_table_rank
B_cell.1 B_cell CD79A 3.2750 0.2925 1 1 2.9825 2.9825
B_cell.2 B_cell MS4A1 3.2500 0.3200 1 1 2.9300 2.9300
CD4_T.16 CD4_T IL7R 3.3000 0.3000 1 1 3.0000 3.0000
CD4_T.17 CD4_T CD3D 3.2375 0.9150 1 1 2.3225 2.3225
CD4_T.18 CD4_T CCR5 2.5250 1.1675 1 1 1.3575 1.3575
CD8_T.31 CD8_T CCL5 3.3500 0.2900 1 1 3.0600 3.0600
CD8_T.32 CD8_T CD3D 3.3750 0.8875 1 1 2.4875 2.4875
CD8_T.33 CD8_T CCR5 2.4500 1.1825 1 1 1.2675 1.2675
Macro.46 Macro C1QC 3.3500 0.2900 1 1 3.0600 3.0600
Macro.47 Macro HLA-DRA 3.2875 0.2925 1 1 2.9950 2.9950
Macro.48 Macro APOE 3.2625 0.3200 1 1 2.9425 2.9425
Mono.61 Mono CXCL8 3.3500 0.2900 1 1 3.0600 3.0600
Mono.62 Mono FCN1 3.3250 0.2950 1 1 3.0300 3.0300
Mono.63 Mono LYZ 3.2875 0.3025 1 1 2.9850 2.9850
NK.76 NK NKG7 3.3000 0.3075 1 1 2.9925 2.9925
NK.77 NK GNLY 3.2750 0.3050 1 1 2.9700 2.9700
NK.78 NK CCR5 2.5125 1.1700 1 1 1.3425 1.3425

Genes of interest 

gene_res <- plot_gene(obj, genes = c("CD3D", "NKG7", "LYZ"))
kable(gene_res$tables$gene_average_by_celltype)
gene cell_type mean_expression
CD3D B_cell 0.3500
LYZ B_cell 0.3125
NKG7 B_cell 0.2875
CD3D CD4_T 3.2375
LYZ CD4_T 0.2500
NKG7 CD4_T 0.2750
CD3D CD8_T 3.3750
LYZ CD8_T 0.3250
NKG7 CD8_T 0.3500
CD3D Macro 0.3000
LYZ Macro 0.3000
NKG7 Macro 0.2750
CD3D Mono 0.3000
LYZ Mono 3.2875
NKG7 Mono 0.3500
CD3D NK 0.2500
LYZ NK 0.3250
NKG7 NK 3.3000

Composition and signatures 

comp_res <- plot_composition(obj)
sig_res <- plot_signature(obj, signatures = c("cytotoxic", "exhaustion"))
kable(comp_res$tables$composition_by_sample)
sample cell_type n_cells n_total fraction
S1 B_cell 0 8 0.0
S1 Macro 0 8 0.0
S1 CD8_T 4 8 0.5
S1 CD4_T 4 8 0.5
S1 Mono 0 8 0.0
S1 NK 0 8 0.0
S2 B_cell 4 8 0.5
S2 Macro 0 8 0.0
S2 CD4_T 0 8 0.0
S2 Mono 0 8 0.0
S2 CD8_T 0 8 0.0
S2 NK 4 8 0.5
S3 B_cell 0 8 0.0
S3 CD4_T 0 8 0.0
S3 Mono 4 8 0.5
S3 Macro 4 8 0.5
S3 CD8_T 0 8 0.0
S3 NK 0 8 0.0 
kable(sig_res$tables$signature_score_by_celltype)
signature cell_type score
cytotoxic B_cell 0.5223214
exhaustion B_cell 0.0000000
cytotoxic CD4_T 0.3839286
exhaustion CD4_T 0.0000000
cytotoxic CD8_T 0.4955357
exhaustion CD8_T 0.0000000
cytotoxic Macro 0.3080357
exhaustion Macro 0.0000000
cytotoxic Mono 0.3571429
exhaustion Mono 0.0000000
cytotoxic NK 0.9642857
exhaustion NK 0.0000000

Report 

report_path <- build_scdown_report(obj)
report_path
#> [1] "C:\\Users\\daiki\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\RtmpAvSl1O\\scdown-report-3b58778d6cf/scdown_report.html"

On this page
